name: S-15 standards-remove archives the matching source-folder file into _archived/ subdirectory per G-9
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree/custom-ns && printf -- '- id: custom-spec
' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: custom-spec
rules: []
' > tree/custom-ns/custom-spec.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id custom-spec --tree tree 2>err.txt && [ -f tree/custom-ns/_archived/custom-spec.yaml ] && [ ! -f tree/custom-ns/custom-spec.yaml ] && echo archived 1>&2
